generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical input current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M) for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance MultiStageGearboxSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gearbox system comprising a standard gearbox followed by a cycloidal gearbox that reduces torque (τ_G) and transmits rotational motion (τ_out) with low gear ratio"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor to measure motor angular position for feedback control"
]

instance SecondaryGearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox to measure gearwheel angular position, reducing backlash and positional uncertainty by comparing readings"
]

// C3: Sensing Component Data Production
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryGearboxEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryGearboxEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryGearboxEncoder
]

// C4: Data Types
instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) measured from motor encoder via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle measured from gearbox encoder via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) calculated from encoder readings and robot dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) derived from encoder measurements and robot dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
]

instance MeasuredAcceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data computed from velocity and torque measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData, DerivedTorqueData
]

// C5: Simulation Models
instance IdealSystemSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing ideal system behavior without friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Coulomb and viscous friction effects using Coulomb-Viscous friction equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction model for velocity-dependent friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing Dahl friction model with hysteresis effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model with velocity-dependent stiffness and damping"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C6: Simulation Processing Models
instance MotorSimulationProcessor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation component in digital shadow processing motor current through friction models to generate simulated motor outputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationProcessor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation component processing gearbox inputs through friction models to generate simulated gearwheel outputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for cycloidal gearbox dynamics including friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C7: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools (BDD, IBD) for structural and behavioral modeling of the first axis components"
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for executable simulation models of friction and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (motor current, output angle) to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAcquisitionService
]

instance CustomDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Customized visualization framework for integrating and comparing measured vs. simulated data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C8: Services
instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, real-time identification of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models using live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, ModelUpdateAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwarenessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of structural (gearbox, motor) and behavioral (friction) models for multi-physics-aware friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralBehaviorInsight
]

instance ControlAccuracyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updated friction models improve robot motion control by reducing up to 30% inaccuracies caused by friction"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlImprovementAction
]

instance DataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, angles, torque, velocity) from physical components to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of data traces (measured vs. simulated) in operational dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardInsight
]

// C9: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous) via comparison of measured vs. simulated outputs"
]

instance StructuralBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Multi-physics awareness combining structural (gearbox) and behavioral (friction) models for comprehensive analysis"
]

instance DataTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of data traces enabling operators to identify friction trends and model discrepancies"
]

instance ModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic updating of friction models during operation via real-time data processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters based on friction model discrepancies to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational dashboard visualization showing reference data (motor output, gearwheel output), simulated data with friction models, and measured vs. simulated comparisons"
]

// C10: Environment
instance FirstVerticalAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, MultiStageGearboxSystem
]

instance RobotControlEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstVerticalAxisEnvironment, MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryGearboxEncoder
]

// C11: System Under Study
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, multi-stage gearbox system, and cycloidal gearbox for machining applications"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, MultiStageGearboxSystem
]

instance MachiningApplicationSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "System with workspace of 2m, positional accuracy ±0.1mm, and path repeatability ±0.06mm operating within ±190° and max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale involves:
  - **Real-time Data Acquisition**: Data streams are processed at **live operational rates** (streamed via MQTT) to support continuous friction model updates.
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models are dynamically exchanged and refined during operation, with no explicit time-scale specification mentioned for model updates beyond real-time processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A unified digital representation of the robot’s first axis, incorporating:
    - **Asset Model**: SysML-based structural and behavioral models.
    - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated data streams (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out).
    - **Processing Components**: Simulation models for friction analysis and model updates.
  - **Interconnected Data Streams**: Data traces are linked via metadata to their physical sources (e.g., encoders, sensors) and computational origins (e.g., friction models), enabling traceability and semantic support."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The life-cycle stages covered by the digital shadow include:
  - **As Operated**: The digital shadow is designed to operate during the **actual machining process** of the robot, focusing on real-time friction analysis and control accuracy improvements.
  - **Representation Phase**: The DT represents the **operational state** of the robot’s first axis, emphasizing continuous monitoring and adaptation during execution."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **Model Accuracy**: Friction models (white-box/black-box) are refined using live operational data to account for wear, load, temperature, and tooling changes.
  - **Data Traceability**: All data traces are linked to their physical sources (e.g., encoders) and computational origins (e.g., friction models) via metadata, ensuring traceability of deviations between measured and simulated values.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Positional uncertainty is mitigated by comparing motor and secondary encoders to infer gearbox elasticity and friction.
  - **Validation**: Real-time dashboard visualization enables operational validation of friction model accuracy by comparing simulated vs. measured outputs."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection involves:
  - **Data Transmission**: Real-time data streams (I_M, angles, torque) are transmitted via **MQTT** protocol to the digital shadow.
  - **Model-Driven Processing**: Simulation models in **MATLAB Simulink** process input data traces (e.g., motor current) to generate simulated outputs (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out).
  - **Dashboard Integration**: Visualization framework aggregates and compares measured vs. simulated data traces for operational insights."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates:
  - **SysML** for structural and behavioral modeling (BDD, IBD).
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation models.
  - **MQTT** for real-time data streaming.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** principles (implicitly referenced in the context of digital shadows and model integration)."
]
